brand.name: Infinite Allergy Labs

voice.tone: Empowering, clear, reassuring. Medical credibility without intimidation. The feeling of 'finally, answers.' Not clinical jargon, not woo-woo wellness. Straight answers for people who are tired of guessing what's wrong
avoid: Diagnosing or medical advice in ads
Making it seem painful or complicated

visual_identity.logo: INFINITE wordmark in navy, with stylized M that forms an infinity-like geometric icon. 'ALLERGY LABS' underneath in smaller text
visual_identity.style: Clean, medical-professional, trustworthy. Navy and white. Minimal design. Feels like a real lab, not a startup

brand.what_they_do: CLIA-certified, COLA-accredited clinical laboratory specializing EXCLUSIVELY in food and environmental allergy/sensitivity testing. They test 88 food antigens and 88 environmental allergens using multiple immune pathways (IgE, IgG, IgG4, C3b/d). Unlike broad labs, they ONLY do allergy testing — that's their entire focus
key_differentiators: Tests 4 immune pathways (IgE, IgG, IgG4, C3b/d) — most competitors only test 1-2
88 food antigens OR 88 environmental allergens per test
CLIA certified + COLA accredited (real lab, not a gimmick)
Both finger prick (at-home) and blood draw options
Color-coded easy-to-read results with food groupings
Free consultation with registered dietitian after results
Accepts insurance (can be as low as $25 + $90 physician fee with coverage)
Specialized — only do allergy testing, nothing else

competitive_landscape.positioning: More comprehensive than DTC competitors (4 immune pathways vs 1-2). More convenient than traditional allergist (at-home option). More specialized than broad testing labs. The 'gold standard' positioned as accessible

testimonials_themes: Finally got answers after years of mystery symptoms
Eliminated trigger foods, symptoms reduced dramatically
Easy at-home process, results came fast
Didn't need sleep medicine anymore after eliminating trigger foods
Running performance improved after removing sensitivities
Detailed results with nutrition plan included
real_testimonial_snippets: I haven't taken my sleep medicine for last two weeks now and not having problem falling asleep
Since I started taking out the foods that I was sensitive to, I feel so much better! I can't even describe how much better my runs feel
I had a sensitivity to beans. It was fascinating to see my results and I am so pleased at the energy I've gained
The technological advancement was strikingly superior to the older methods I experienced 15 years ago, which were largely inconclusive

dtc_messaging.headline: Find the Root Cause For a Healthier Life
dtc_messaging.subheadline: Discover the foods that trigger your body and may cause inflammation, fatigue, weight challenges, or chronic health issues
dtc_messaging.key_stat: 95% of all chronic conditions are associated with inflammation
dtc_messaging.insurance_messaging: Accepts both insurance & cash. Many plans with out-of-network benefits reimburse part of the cost

process_for_DTC.step_1: Order kit online (shipped to your door)
process_for_DTC.step_2: Collect sample (finger prick at home OR schedule blood draw)
process_for_DTC.step_3: Ship sample back (prepaid return label included)
process_for_DTC.step_4: Get results in 3-5 business days (online portal)
process_for_DTC.step_5: Free consultation with registered dietitian to review results
